title: × Tsugopiceopicea crassifolia
taxonomy: × Tsugopiceopicea crassifolia is a hybrid plant, specifically a cross between Tsuga canadensis (Eastern Hemlock) and Picea pungens (Colorado Blue Spruce). The classification of this hybrid plant is not well-documented, but it is likely to be classified as a coniferous tree in the family Pinaceae. Further classification may include being placed in the genus Tsugopicea or Picea, as it is a hybrid of the two. The species name crassifolia suggests a thick-leaved or fleshy-leaved characteristic, which may be a distinguishing feature of this hybrid plant. This plant's classification is an area of ongoing research and study.
